name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
notes: This rule defines all Operating Systems on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, Linux OS, Hewlett Packard UniX, Solaris Operating System Authentication Messages, IBM AIX Audit, IBM AIX Server, Mac OS X, IBM i, Cilasoft QJRN/400
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, Linux OS, Hewlett Packard UniX, Solaris Operating System Authentication Messages, IBM AIX Audit, IBM AIX Server, Mac OS X, IBM i, Cilasoft QJRN/400
